info.title: Troy Hokanson Document Standards Fetcher
info.description: Fetches the live HEADER_STANDARD.md and VOICE_STANDARD.md from the public GitHub repository to enforce formatting and voice rules on generated resumes and cover letters.

get.summary: Fetch a standard document (HEADER_STANDARD.md or VOICE_STANDARD.md) from the GitHub repository.

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: The name of the standard file to fetch. Must be either HEADER_STANDARD.md or VOICE_STANDARD.md

200.description: Successful response containing the raw markdown content of the requested standard document.
